query:
SELECT c.code, c.title as courseTitle, l.id as lessonId, l.title as lessonTitle, l.lessonOrder
FROM courses c
JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.lessonId = l.id
WHERE q.id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.code, l.lessonOrder
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.code, c.title as courseTitle, l.id as lessonId, l.title as lessonTitle, l.lessonOrder
FROM courses c
JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.lessonId = l.id
WHERE q.id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.code, l.lessonOrder
LIMIT 50;

rows.lessonTitle: The Life and Ministry of Jesus
